description.unified: Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores HP every 1sec for 10sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic DEF by 50*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.

Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second is increased by 35%.
